creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #1)
One use cases is installing to an alternate location for testing.  Sometimes cross-compilation / cross-compiled tools are built with a different prefix.

Note this is not quite a duplicate of bug 216475, but 

Regarding iconv, I don't know about its use in ldb, I was just fixing compilation edge cases for non-default LOCALBASE & PREFIX.  If you think iconv is useless for ldb, then an alternate change is to disable iconv detection / use.

As far as the OS version, these problems were noticed on 11-stable & 10-stable, and64.
